Module org.kink_lang.kink

Package org.kink_lang.kink.internal.function

package org.kink_lang.kink.internal.function
General perpose functional interfaces complement to java.util.function package.
  • Interfaces
    Class
    Description
    Function3<T0,T1,T2,R>
    A ternary function.
    Function4<T0,T1,T2,T3,R>
    A quaternary function.
    ThrowingFunction0<R>
    An nullary function which may throw a throwable.
    ThrowingFunction1<T0,R>
    An unary function which may throw a throwable.
    ThrowingFunction2<T0,T1,R>
    A binary function which may throw a throwable.
    ThrowingFunction3<T0,T1,T2,R>
    A ternary function which may throw a throwable.
    ThrowingFunction4<T0,T1,T2,T3,R>
    A quaternary function which may throw a throwable.
